description: Tests for R package development workflow

evals.name: initialize-package-structure
evals.prompt: Initialize a new R package called 'testpkg' in W:\arthur\misc\202602_awesome_r_skills\tests\creating-r-package\workspace
evals.expected_output: Creates package with DESCRIPTION, NAMESPACE, R/, tests/, man/ directories, package passes basic checks

assertions.check: DESCRIPTION contains Package, Title, Version, Authors, Description fields
Directory layout matches standard R package structure (no custom deviations)

evals.name: add-function-with-roxygen
evals.prompt: Add a function 'add_numbers(a, b)' to the testpkg package with roxygen2 documentation that exports the function
evals.expected_output: Creates R/add_numbers.R with function definition, roxygen2 comments (@param, @return, @export), generates man/add_numbers.Rd

assertions.check: R/add_numbers.R contains 'add_numbers <- function(a, b)' and returns a + b
Runs devtools::document() or roxygen2::roxygenize() without errors

evals.name: run-r-cmd-check
evals.prompt: Run R CMD check on the testpkg package
evals.expected_output: Executes R CMD check, reports any WARNINGS or ERRORS, package should pass with 0 errors, 0 warnings (notes acceptable)

assertions.check: Runs rcmdcheck::rcmdcheck() or R CMD check command
If warnings or notes present, output explains what they mean and whether they're acceptable
